title: Events - Stephen Morgan MP
headings: h2: Sign up to my newsletter
text_excerpt: Events - Stephen Morgan MP Skip to main content x-twitter bluesky facebook instagram email Hit enter to search or ESC to close Search Close Search search Menu About Portsmouth Parliament Education Economy Health Environment Crime Defence Campaigns Events Transparency Get in touch search Events Below are the forthcoming events available for booking. Please ensure you book onto the event you wish to attend. Cuppa and Chat Future of Palmerston Social Media For Children Business Crime Saturday 9 May 2026 10.30am – 12 noon ‘Cuppa and Chat’ on Crime and ASB Event Location: Fratton Specific location will be sent via email 24 hours prior to the event once your booking has been confirmed. This event is only open to Portsmouth South Constituents. This will be an opportunity to share thoughts and ideas with Stephen Morgan MP on the topic of Crime and ASB. There will be a panel of local representatives to share information and answer questions. Light refreshments will be provided. Stephen Morgan MP hosts regular ‘Cuppa and Chat’ events across our community to give constituents an opportunity to: come to say hello and share ideas, issues and concerns about topics of interest hear from a panel of local experts who will be available to answer questions Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Name * First Last Residential address * Address Line 1 City State / Province / Region Postal Code Email * Phone Number * Details of specific issues or concerns * Register Please note: This event is for Portsmouth South constituents only. There may be photos taken so please let the team know if you would not like to be photographed. Please inform the team if you have any needs that require assistance. In his capacity as MP for Portsmouth South, Stephen Morgan MP will use the personal information you provided for the purpose of local events and a regular newsletter. Stephen may contact you via the communication channels you have chosen and for the purposes specified. We may also contact you by post using the electoral register, which Stephen is entitled to use as an MP. You can opt out of communications from us or manage your preferences at any time. For more information about how we use personal data please visit our Privacy Policy page. Friday 15 May 2026 4.30 – 5.30pm The Future of Palmerston Road – Round Table This is the seventh in a series of events to discuss current challenges and future opportunities for the Palmerston Road area. Stephen is concerned about the condition of the public realm in this part of Portsmouth. This discussion is to hear views, ideas and concerns. This event is open to businesses in the Palmerston Road Area. The event location will be sent via email prior to the event once your booking has been confirmed. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.
